column1: We live in a big house. I like ... house very much.
Yesterday she got … letter. The letter was from her mother.
Please turn on … radio, I'd like to listen to … news.
I have … cat. … my cat is black and white.
On  Saturday and on Sunday he does not go to ... work.
When we come home, we have ... dinner.
Our TV set is on ... little table in ... corner of ... room.
Where is ... cat? — ... cat is on ... sofa.
Where is ... book? — ... book is on ... shelf.
